allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const u = process.env.DATABASE_URL || ''; console.log\('Protocol:', u.split\('://'\)[0] || 'not set'\);")
Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const u = process.env.DIRECT_URL || ''; console.log\('DIRECT Protocol:', u.split\('://'\)[0] || 'not set'\);")

Bash(node -e "try { const g = require\('./node_modules/.prisma/client/index.js'\); console.log\('generated client ok'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('generated client error:', e.message.slice\(0,200\)\); }")

Bash(node -e 'require\('\\''dotenv'\\''\).config\(\); const { PrismaClient } = require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.$queryRawUnsafe\('\\''SELECT 1'\\''\).then\(r => { console.log\('\\''DB OK:'\\'', r\); p.$disconnect\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.log\('\\''Error code:'\\'', e.code\); console.log\('\\''Error msg:'\\'', e.message\); p.$disconnect\(\); }\);')

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const u = process.env.DATABASE_URL || ''; console.log\('First 30 chars:', u.slice\(0,30\)\); console.log\('Starts with postgresql://', u.startsWith\('postgresql://'\)\); console.log\('Starts with prisma://', u.startsWith\('prisma://'\)\);")
